title: Pica Falls
description: Pages 18–22 focus on pica falls, keeping the Dressrosa conflict and character roles clear for display.
scene: This part follows Kyros, Unknown person #1, Zoro, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5 as zoro defeats Pica, protecting King Riku and proving that Doflamingo's strongest defenses can be broken.

dialogue.speaker: Kyros
dialogue.text: This is my fight, Rebecca!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: FA-

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Drop...that sword!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: These past 10 years...

dialogue.speaker: Kyros
dialogue.text: Father! Come under this um- Brella! You're going to die!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You've honored...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Your mother's wish, haven't you?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: My mom told me I shouldn't hurt people...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I will teach you how to ensure that you don't get hurt!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: without wounding a single opponent!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: She's won every match by ring out!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: The UN- defeated woman!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: How can you win without even touching your opponent!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Show us some blood, you coward!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: What a pathetic match!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: You're a shame to all Gladia- Tors!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Despite having stood in that col- Osseum,

dialogue.speaker: Kyros
dialogue.text: DIE, Rebecca!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo Family
dialogue.text: You and your inhuman family!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Your blood is filthy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: You haven't wounded a single person! Your hands are still...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Beau- TifUL!

dialogue.speaker: Kyros
dialogue.text: In those hands, your mother, scarlet...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: Lives on!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: mother...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: You shall not dirty those hands...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: With the blood of this wretch!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: I shall not suffer you to swing a sword!

dialogue.speaker: Diamante
dialogue.text: Kyros!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: You flithy piece of...! Is your body... made of steel!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: No. This fool is insane! Made of pure crazy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: Pain is proof of humanity! The likes of you could never comprehend that!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: Doesn't anyone recognize me!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: It is it!

dialogue.speaker: Diamante
dialogue.text: Kyros!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: You cannot comprehend it! The despair of being forgot- ten by your loved ones!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: I cannot even feel...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: The warmth of your dying body...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: The agony of being unable to feel whatever you touch!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: Compared with the countless tragedies that have blanketed dressrossa,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: This rain is nothing!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: I am not made of steel but...

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: I, as this country's anger em- bodies,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: Shall take you down!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: What the hell is this guy's power!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: Your glory days were over 20 years ago!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Don't make the mistake of looking down on my swords- manship!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: So you still stand... you bloody monster.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: HAA

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: My rain's stopped as well...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: If you really want to die so badly,

dialogue.speaker: Kyros
dialogue.text: I'll kill you in an instant! Just like scarlet!

dialogue.speaker: Diamante
dialogue.text: Kyros! Take her!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: She's your daughter!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: The Palace.. is on fire!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: pirate! What have you done to this country! To its King!

dialogue.speaker: Diamante
dialogue.text: kyros...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #43
dialogue.text: I wonder if you can dodge this...with that wounded leg of yours.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #44
dialogue.text: I have no intention of dodging!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #45
dialogue.text: I shall have you return our peace!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #46
dialogue.text: Only a fool wouldn't dodge this!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #47
dialogue.text: HAIF...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #48
dialogue.text: Moon

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #49
dialogue.text: TruEND

summary: Pica Falls advances the Dressrosa story through Kyros, Unknown person #1, Zoro, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, with unclear voices kept readable rather than forced into unsafe speaker assignments.
